items.title: Automatic i18n Updates from zh-CN in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces automated translation updates for internationalization (i18n) based on changes from the zh-CN source. Key modifications include updates to multiple language files, enhancing the localization experience across various languages. The changes ensure that users have access to the latest translations, improving usability and accessibility.

items.title: Enhance auto-issue logic for decision-ready tracking in Sol Radar 🚀
items.summary: This update strengthens the auto-issue logic for the Track 4.3 milestone, ensuring that the next decision-ready flip is fully auditable. It also addresses and closes stale issue #126, which was a false positive due to earlier loose criteria. Key modifications include the addition of logic to surface ready buckets and criteria for better verification.

items.title: Enhance conversation retrieval format in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new API serializer that normalizes the format of conversation data retrieved from the aichat2 worker. It enriches `tool_use` blocks and integrates `tool_result` data, ensuring a consistent output shape for clients like Nexior and Dify. This change improves the UI experience by preventing garbled user messages and simplifies the handling of tool calls across different models.

items.title: Enhance Shadow Trader for Timely Price Snapshots in Sol Radar 🚀
items.summary: This update addresses a bug where 37 ledger entries had missing entry prices due to timing issues. By adding a push trigger for report merges, we ensure that price snapshots are captured within the fresh cycle window, improving data accuracy and reducing the need for backfilling. This change enhances the overall functionality of the Shadow Trader workflow.

items.title: Enhance OpenAI Image Feature Visibility in Nexior 🎨
items.summary: This update adds the OpenAI Image feature toggle to the site settings and ensures it appears in the dynamic default route. Additionally, the feature is now visible in the navigator without relying on the ChatGPT toggle. Localization updates have also been made for 18 languages, ensuring consistent user experience across different regions.

items.title: Documenting Real Shadow-Trader Run and Fixes in Sol Radar 🚀
items.summary: This update documents the first real cron run of the shadow-trader, highlighting the output and the importance of the changes made in PR #127. Key modifications include a new section in REAL-MONEY.md and an entry in IMPROVEMENT-PLAN.md that clarify the updated criteria for tradeable buckets. These adjustments enhance the robustness of the trading model and ensure accurate decision-making.

items.title: Enhance Decision Criteria for Shadow Trader in Sol Radar 🚀
items.summary: This update tightens the decision-making criteria for the shadow trader by implementing two key gates: a tradeable-bucket gate and a friction floor. The new rule ensures that `decision_ready` is only set to true when specific conditions are met, improving the accuracy of buy signals. Additionally, tests have been updated and verified, resulting in 95 passing tests.

items.title: Clean Up 404 Links for GitHub Repos in .github 🚀
items.summary: This update fixes the issue of linking to non-existent GitHub repositories on the AceDataCloud organization landing page. The script now filters out MCP, CLI, and API rows that point to missing repositories or PyPI packages, ensuring that only valid links are displayed. The README has been regenerated, resulting in a cleaner and more accurate profile.

items.title: Streamline task_tools.py formatting in M C Ps ✨
items.summary: This update applies the ruff formatting tool to the tools/task_tools.py file, collapsing a multi-line Field description into a single line. This change addresses a linting issue that was causing the main branch to fail after an auto-sync. The modifications enhance code readability and maintainability.

items.title: Fix landing page routing to follow feature order in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update resolves an issue where all Nexior sites were defaulting to the ChatGPT landing page, regardless of the configured feature order. The router now respects the order of features as returned by the platform API, allowing site operators to set their preferred landing page. If no recognized feature is available, it will still default to ChatGPT, ensuring consistent behavior across configurations.

items.title: New buyback record added for April 2026 in Roadmap 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new on-chain buyback record scheduled for April 26, 2026, utilizing creator fees. The transaction will convert $25 into 75,520 ACE through the Pump.fun AMM venue. The buyback history has been updated accordingly to reflect this addition.

items.title: Exciting New Hailuo CLI and Midjourney Updates in Clis 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a brand new Hailuo CLI, enabling users to generate AI videos from text prompts and manage tasks effectively. Additionally, the Midjourney CLI has been enhanced with new billing flags and improved task retrieval options, ensuring a smoother user experience. These changes significantly expand the functionality and usability of both CLIs.

items.title: New Hailuo Service Documentation and Midjourney Verification in A P Is 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces comprehensive documentation for the new Hailuo video generation service, including integration guides for both video and task APIs. The Midjourney documentation remains in sync with the existing guides, ensuring consistency across services. These enhancements aim to streamline developer access and usage of the Hailuo API features.

items.title: Enhance Shadow Trader with Backfill and CLI Features in Sol Radar 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a backfill-safe entry price for the Track 4.3 shadow trader, allowing immediate ingestion of historical intents. A new CLI command, `solradar shadow-status`, provides real-time status on decision readiness. Additionally, an automated issue creation feature streamlines tracking when conditions are met, enhancing operational efficiency.

items.title: Boosting Marketing Insights with New KPIs in Roadmap 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces two new marketing KPIs to the Roadmap page: 'New Signups' and 'Top Services by Usage'. The 'New Signups' metric tracks registrations over the last 7/30 days, while the 'Top Services' feature visualizes the most used APIs. These enhancements improve the visibility of key performance indicators, aiding in better decision-making.

items.title: Enhance Midjourney Task Queries with New Parameters in M C Ps 🚀
items.summary: This update syncs the Midjourney MCP server with the latest upstream Docs commit. Key enhancements include the addition of `trace_id`, `trace_ids`, `offset`, and `limit` parameters to the `/midjourney/tasks` endpoint, allowing for more flexible task retrieval options. These changes improve the usability of the task query tools, enabling better handling of task identification and pagination.

items.title: Accelerate Track 4.3 with Shadow Trading in Sol Radar 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a shadow paper-trading layer that allows for immediate tracking of borderline buy/hold intents without the previous 30-day wait. Key features include new CLI commands for recording and grading shadow entries, an hourly workflow for automated data collection, and comprehensive unit tests to ensure reliability. This enhancement paves the way for quicker statistical validation, enabling potential real-money investments sooner than expected.

items.title: Boosting E2E Testing with New Probes in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces 10 new continuous end-to-end probes for `api.acedata.cloud`, enhancing the diversity of prompts and inputs across existing chat and image probes. Key changes include the addition of various testing scenarios, such as token counting and localization, along with improved randomization in prompt selection. These enhancements aim to improve the robustness and reliability of our testing framework.

items.title: Enhance OpenAI Service Sync with New Models in S D K 🚀
items.summary: This update verifies that the SDK is in sync with the latest OpenAI service specifications, which now include new models like `gpt-5.5` and `gpt-5.5-pro`. Additionally, 20 new optional parameters have been added to the `chat/completions` schema, and the `images/edits` schema is now fully documented. No code changes were necessary as the SDK already accommodates these updates.

items.title: Enhance Report Validation for Track 2.3 in Sol Radar 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new validation mechanism for report front-matter in Track 2.3, ensuring that every 'buy' or 'hold' intent includes necessary fields: `top10_holder_pct` and `creator_rug_count`. A new CLI command has been added for linting reports, and the workflow now aborts trades if these fields are missing. Additionally, 10 unit tests have been implemented to ensure the robustness of these changes.

items.title: Revamped API Docs with Real Responses in Backend 🚀
items.summary: All 30 platform meta-API documentation files have been completely rewritten to include real, tested API responses. Key changes include the addition of a new file, updated field descriptions, and corrected pagination keys to align with actual API behavior. This update enhances clarity and accuracy for developers using the Ace Data Cloud platform.

items.title: Updated OpenAI Docs Image URLs in APIs 🚀
items.summary: This update synchronizes the OpenAI documentation with the latest changes from AceDataCloud. Key modifications include updated image URLs in the integration guides, ensuring that the examples reflect the most current assets. These changes enhance the accuracy and usability of the documentation for developers.

items.title: New API Docs for Claude, DeepSeek, Gemini, Grok, and Kimi in APIs 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces comprehensive API documentation for five new services: Claude, DeepSeek, Gemini, Grok, and Kimi. Each service now has its own directory with detailed guides covering usage, integration, and API references, enhancing developer resources on the AceDataCloud platform. Key fixes were also applied during the conversion process to ensure accuracy and consistency.

items.title: Enhance Post-Trade Monitoring with Rugpull Alerts in Sol Radar 🚨
items.summary: This update introduces a robust post-trade rugpull alarm system that monitors currently open positions for critical changes. Key features include a new CLI command for position monitoring, scheduled checks every 30 minutes, and alerts for significant price drops, liquidity changes, and security issues. The implementation includes comprehensive unit tests and updates to relevant documentation, ensuring users are promptly notified of potential risks.

items.title: OpenAI SDK Sync Verified: No Changes Needed in S D K 🚀
items.summary: The upstream `openai.json` spec has been updated with new optional parameters and the addition of `dall-e-2` to model enums. Our SDK's flexible design allows it to accommodate these changes without any code modifications. This ensures that users can seamlessly utilize the latest features without disruption.

items.title: Fix critical OpenAPI spec issues in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update addresses two major OpenAPI specification bugs identified during a comprehensive audit. Key changes include renaming an empty property in the Midjourney tasks endpoint, correcting the action field requirements, and replacing incorrect example data in the Hailuo videos endpoint. These fixes enhance the accuracy and usability of the API documentation.

items.title: Enhanced OpenAI-Compatible Chat Specs in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update enriches six sibling chat-completion specifications by applying OpenAI-canonical enhancements. Each spec now features a significant increase in fields, expanding from 6-7 to 28-29 fields, which includes new request body parameters and enriched response details. The changes improve compatibility and functionality across various providers, ensuring a more robust integration.

items.title: Enhance OpenAI Image Model Documentation in M C Ps 🚀
items.summary: This update adds the missing `dall-e-2` model to the OpenAI image model documentation. Key changes include the addition of `dall-e-2` to the `openai_list_image_models` table and the Supported Image Models list in the README. These updates ensure that the documentation is fully aligned with the latest OpenAPI specifications.

items.title: Enhance Twitter Scraping with Real Data in Sol Radar 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a real Twitter scraping feature via AceDataCloud's Serp, replacing previously fabricated mention counts with accurate ground-truth data. Key changes include the addition of new scripts for scraping and verification, as well as modifications to the Grok credibility check to ensure it only labels sentiment without generating numbers. The implementation has been verified against known tokens, returning reliable data with zero errors.

items.title: Enhance Security Probes to Close Gaps in Criticality Checks in Sol Radar 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces three new fallback rules to the security probe's criticality checks, addressing previously identified gaps in the detection of suspicious mints. The changes ensure that all known-suspicious mints are now correctly demoted, enhancing the overall security of the system. Additionally, new tests have been added to validate these improvements and ensure robustness.

items.title: Add DALL-E 2 to Image Models in Clis 🎨
items.summary: This update integrates `dall-e-2` into the IMAGE_MODELS list, allowing users to select it via the `--model` option for both image generation and editing commands. The change ensures that the CLI is fully aligned with the latest OpenAPI specifications, enhancing functionality for users. All other models and parameters remain unchanged.

items.title: New REAL-MONEY Playbook for Safe Trading in Sol Radar 🚀
items.summary: We've introduced a comprehensive `docs/REAL-MONEY.md` that serves as a pre-flight checklist for users engaging in real-money trades. This document outlines essential safety gates, recommended caps, and crucial guidelines to ensure a secure trading experience. Additionally, the README now directs users to this playbook as the first step before initiating live trades.

items.title: Enhance capability validation logic in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update modifies the account validation process to prevent premature invalidation on transient failures. Now, a capability will only be marked as invalid after more than two failures, allowing for better stability and logging of warnings for transient issues.

items.title: Enhance ephone and wcnb with grok-4 capabilities in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces grok-4 support to both ephone and wcnb, enhancing their capabilities significantly. The checker will automatically adjust to validate these models once upstream support is available. Additionally, grok-4-1-fast-non-reasoning has been added to ephone, ensuring better performance options.

items.title: Enhance OpenAPI with DALL-E 2 Support in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update adds `dall-e-2` to the `model.enum` for the `POST /openai/images/edits` endpoint in the OpenAPI specification. The documentation now accurately reflects the supported models, ensuring users are aware of all available options for image editing. Cost rules have also been verified to include `dall-e-2`, maintaining billing accuracy.

items.title: Enhance Jupiter Slippage Gate for Smarter Trades in Sol Radar 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new slippage gate feature that checks for liquidity before executing trades, ensuring that swaps do not incur excessive price impacts. The implementation includes a new CLI flag for slippage checks and an environment variable to set maximum price impact thresholds. With this addition, the manual-live-trade pipeline will now refuse trades that do not meet liquidity requirements, enhancing overall trading safety.

items.title: Fix nested optional fields rendering in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update addresses the incorrect rendering of nested optional fields in API documentation. Previously, all nested fields were marked as required, regardless of the OpenAPI specification. The fix ensures that only the appropriate fields are marked as required, improving the accuracy of the API docs across all endpoints.

items.title: Enhance OpenAI Integration with New Guides in A P Is 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces two new integration guides for OpenAI services: the Chat Completion API for the `gpt-4o-image` model and the Embeddings API for generating embedding vectors. These additions fill gaps in the existing documentation and provide users with essential information on utilizing these powerful AI tools effectively. The existing guides remain up-to-date with the latest models, ensuring comprehensive support for developers.

items.title: Enhance OpenAI Spec with Missing Fields in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update enriches the OpenAI chat completions OpenAPI specification by adding 20 missing fields and enhancing existing ones. Key additions include parameters for sampling controls, operational metadata, and enriched response details, ensuring the API documentation aligns with the official OpenAI schema. These changes improve usability and accuracy for developers integrating with the OpenAI API.

items.title: New Budget Cap Gates for Enhanced Trade Safety in Sol Radar 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces new per-trade and rolling-24h budget cap gates to enhance trade safety. The new settings prevent excessive trades that could drain wallets due to misconfigurations or runaway scripts. A trade ledger has been added to track past trades, ensuring compliance with the new budget limits. Comprehensive tests confirm the functionality of these new features.

items.title: Revamped onboarding guides for platform-token and platform-config in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update includes a comprehensive rewrite of the onboarding documentation for platform-token and platform-config in Chinese. Key changes include detailed examples verified against the live production API, corrections to response schemas, and the establishment of conventions for future documentation updates. These enhancements aim to improve clarity and usability for developers integrating with the Ace Data Cloud platform.

items.title: Enhance ImageModel with DALL-E 2 in M C Ps 🎨
items.summary: This update adds `dall-e-2` to the `ImageModel` type in the OpenAI service, aligning it with the latest OpenAPI specification. The change ensures consistency across the image generation models and updates the model field description accordingly. This enhancement will improve the functionality of the image generation endpoint.

items.title: Fix broken OpenAI image in Backend 🛠️
items.summary: Updated the integration guide for the OpenAI images/edits by replacing a broken CDN URL with a regenerated image. This change ensures that users can view the correct bookshelf example in the zh-CN documentation. The fix enhances the overall user experience by providing accurate visual references.

items.title: Enhance Buy Verification with Cycle-Stability Gate in Sol Radar 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new cycle-stability gate that enhances the buy verification process by analyzing historical cycles for potential risks. The system now refuses buy intents if any of the last N cycles for the same mint had a conflicting action or rationale indicating suspicious activity. This change aims to improve the safety and reliability of trading decisions within the SolRadar platform.

items.title: Enhance Pre-Trade Safety with Intent Verification in Sol Radar 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new command, `solradar verify-intent <mint> --action buy`, which performs comprehensive safety checks before executing trades. It integrates into the manual live trade workflow, ensuring that trades are only executed if all safety gates pass, thus preventing potential losses from stale data. Additionally, eight unit tests have been added to validate this functionality, enhancing the reliability of the trading process.

items.title: Enhance audio capabilities with `fish` provider in S D K 🎶
items.summary: This update introduces the `fish` audio provider to the SDK, allowing users to access Fish music generation features. Key changes include updates to TypeScript and Python files to include `fish` in the AudioProvider union type and the SERVICE_TASK_ENDPOINTS. Additionally, the READMEs have been updated to reflect this new provider, enhancing documentation for users.

items.title: Enhance OpenAI Image Generation Docs in Backend 🎨
items.summary: This update improves the OpenAPI specification for image generation by adding support for the DALL-E 2 model and introducing a dropdown of curated example prompts. The documentation now accurately reflects the capabilities of the backend, allowing users to select from 14 preset prompts or enter their own. No changes were made to backend functionality or cost rules.

items.title: Documentation Update for OpenAI in S D K 🚀
items.summary: This update confirms that the recent documentation changes for OpenAI are purely informational and do not affect the SDK. The OpenAI endpoints remain consistent with the SDK, and newly documented models are already included in the spec. No changes to the SDK are necessary, ensuring both TypeScript and Python versions remain in sync.

items.title: Enhance OpenAI Image API Docs with Nano Banana Models in A P Is 🚀
items.summary: This update syncs the latest documentation for the Nano Banana series models, including `nano-banana`, `nano-banana-2`, and `nano-banana-pro`, into the OpenAI Images API guides. Key changes include updated introductions and dedicated sections in both the generations and edits integration guides, along with examples for usage and parameter restrictions. The README has also been updated to reflect these new models, ensuring comprehensive coverage for users.

items.title: Updated GPT-Image-2 Sample Images in Backend 🎨
items.summary: This update refreshes the broken sample images in the GPT-Image-2 section of the documentation. The task IDs for the images were updated after re-running the examples, ensuring all images now return successfully. The other language variants of the document remain unchanged as they do not include this section.

items.title: Enhance Threshold Documentation in Sol Radar 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new section in the README that classifies every numeric threshold as either 'backtest-validated' or 'guess'. It highlights the current status of thresholds, ensuring users are aware that none are validated for live trading as of April 2026. Additionally, the IMPROVEMENT-PLAN has been updated to reflect this change.

items.title: Documentation Sync Confirmation in M C Ps 📚
items.summary: This update confirms that the automated sync for the overview service is purely documentation-related, triggered by changes to the `mcp/overview.mdx` files. No API service or code changes were involved, ensuring the MCPs monorepo remains fully in sync without any modifications needed.

items.title: Documentation Sync for Overview in M C Ps 📚
items.summary: This update addresses a no-op sync for the `overview` service, which is purely documentation-related. The changes involve translation updates for `mcp/overview.mdx` and related OpenAI guide pages, with no modifications to API schemas or server implementations. All existing MCP server implementations remain in sync, requiring no code changes.

items.title: Track 4.5 Completed with Real-Data Verification in Sol Radar 🚀
items.summary: This update marks the completion of Track 4.5 with a successful clean real-data verification run. The results show that 31 out of 33 mints returned valid data, confirming the reliability of the pipeline. However, Track 4.3 remains blocked due to the absence of historical 'buy' or 'hold' decisions, necessitating further adjustments to the scoring system.

items.title: Documentation Sync Complete: Overview Translations in S D K 🚀
items.summary: This update confirms that the recent documentation sync only involved translation changes in the `mcp/overview.mdx` file, with no impact on the SDK. The translations from English to Chinese affect 17 language variants, ensuring consistency across documentation. All other components remain in sync with the latest specifications, and no code changes are necessary.

items.title: Enhance README with WanAPI entry in A P Is 🚀
items.summary: This update adds the missing `wan/` entry to the README APIs table, ensuring it reflects the full range of available services. The addition includes a link to the WanAPI documentation, which supports video generation. This change improves clarity and accessibility for users navigating the API documentation.

items.title: Add Chinese Dev Guide for GLM Chat Completion API in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a comprehensive development guide for the GLM Chat Completion API in Chinese, enhancing user experience for developers. The guide includes sections on application processes, basic usage, streaming responses, multi-turn conversations, and error handling, all supported by real API call examples. This addition aligns GLM's documentation with other LLM services, providing essential resources for integration.

items.title: Documentation updates for overview translations in Clis 📚
items.summary: This update includes documentation-only changes related to the translation of the `mcp/overview.mdx` file. Key modifications involve the localization of card labels and subtitles, ensuring clarity for users in different languages. No changes to CLI code or API schemas were necessary as this update pertains solely to documentation.

items.title: Documentation updates synced smoothly in M C Ps 🚀
items.summary: This update reflects no operational changes, focusing solely on the documentation for the `mcp/overview.mdx` translations across 17 languages. All modifications are confined to documentation files, ensuring no impact on API services or server code. The repository remains in sync with upstream changes, confirming a seamless integration.

items.title: Enhance Async Image Task Retrieval with New API Tools in M C Ps 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces new tools for the Tasks API, allowing users to retrieve and list async image tasks. Key additions include the `openai_get_task` and `openai_list_tasks` functions, enhancing the MCP server's capabilities. Documentation has been updated to reflect these changes, providing clear usage examples for developers.

items.title: Enhance Historical Backtesting with Real Data in Sol Radar 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces Track 4.5, implementing a true point-in-time historical price layer for backtesting in SolRadar. The new functionality replaces the previous DEX Screener's rolling-24h snapshot with actual returns sourced from GeckoTerminal, improving accuracy in backtest results. Key files updated include the addition of a new historical provider and modifications to the backtest service, along with comprehensive unit tests to ensure reliability.

items.title: Update GitHub Markdown CSS to Latest Version in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps the GitHub Markdown CSS package from version 5.8.1 to 5.9.0. Key changes include the addition of CSS files for all GitHub themes, enhancing the styling options available. The update also includes various improvements and fixes that contribute to better rendering of markdown content.

items.title: Automated i18n Updates from Chinese in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces auto-generated internationalization (i18n) translation updates based on changes from the Chinese (zh-CN) source. Key modifications include updates to multiple language files, enhancing the application's accessibility for non-Chinese speakers. The changes ensure that users across various languages receive accurate translations, improving user experience significantly.

items.title: Exciting New Tool Calling UI Components for aichat2 Integration in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces new frontend components and types for the aichat2 AI orchestrator tool-calling UI. Key additions include `ToolCallBlock`, `ArtifactBlock`, and `ThinkingBlock`, enhancing the user experience with collapsible displays and artifact previews. Additionally, a new API method, `chatConversationV2`, has been implemented to handle SSE events efficiently while maintaining backward compatibility.

items.title: Automated i18n Updates from zh-CN in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces automated translation updates for internationalization (i18n) based on changes from the zh-CN source. Several cache files have been renamed and new files added to streamline the translation process. This enhancement will improve localization efforts and ensure timely updates for users.

items.title: Dynamic Default Route Based on Site Features in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a dynamic root route that redirects based on enabled site features, enhancing user navigation. Key changes include modifications to the router to read from `site.features`, ensuring the first enabled feature is prioritized. Additionally, a new constant for `ROUTE_SERP_INDEX` has been added, and import paths have been corrected for better consistency.

items.title: Update README to Include OpenAI Image in Nexior 🌟
items.summary: This update adds OpenAI Image to the AI Image service list in the README.md for both English and Chinese sections. This change ensures that the documentation aligns with the recent integration, enhancing clarity for users. The README now accurately reflects the available services, improving the overall user experience.

items.title: Enhance code snippet highlighting on language switch in Frontend Web 🎨
items.summary: This update fixes the issue where code snippets on the API documentation page were not retaining syntax highlighting when users switched between language tabs. The solution involved resetting the highlighting state before reapplying styles, ensuring a consistent user experience across all language selections. Manual testing confirmed that the highlighting now works seamlessly for all transitions.

items.title: Revamped Document Balance & Key Panel for Clarity in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: The right-side balance and key panel on the document detail page has been completely redesigned for improved usability. Key features now include a polished card layout displaying both instance and general balances, an easily accessible App ID, and a streamlined API key section. This update enhances user experience by providing essential information at a glance and maintaining consistency across the platform.

items.title: Exciting New Backtest CLI for SolRadar in Sol Radar 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces the `solradar backtest` CLI subcommand, which replays recent research reports to provide survival and 24-hour directional statistics. Key files have been added and modified, including a new backtest service and parser, enhancing the tool's analytical capabilities. The initial run shows promising survival rates across score buckets, although caution is advised for higher scores due to potential inaccuracies.

items.title: Exciting New OpenAI Image Features in Nexior 🎨
items.summary: This update introduces a comprehensive OpenAI Image module to Nexior, enabling users to generate and edit images with async task polling. Key additions include a dedicated OpenAI Image page, various configuration components, and support for multiple languages. The integration enhances user experience by allowing seamless image processing and management.

items.title: Finalize report front-matter for distribution signals in Sol Radar 🚀
items.summary: This update finalizes the report front-matter by adding new fields: top10_holder_pct and creator_rug_count to the report-format contract. Additionally, the template has been annotated with these new intent fields, and Track 2.3 has been marked complete in the IMPROVEMENT-PLAN. These changes enhance the reporting capabilities and data insights for users.

items.title: Enhance Token Analysis with Holder Distribution and Creator History in Sol Radar 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces new scripts for holder distribution and creator history, enhancing the token analysis capabilities. The `holder_profile` and `creator_history` probes have been integrated into the security provider and wired into the pipeline for improved scoring. Additionally, updates have been made to the research cycle and the improvement plan to reflect these changes.

items.title: Introducing manage-cls-alarm skill for enhanced alarm management in Index 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new **manage-cls-alarm** skill, distinct from the existing log-search capabilities. It includes a comprehensive CLI tool for managing CLS alarm policies, notice groups, and execution logs, enhancing the precision of tool selection for users. Key files added are the skill definition and the alarm management script, which supports various alarm operations.

items.title: Documentation Sync for Pricing and Service Intros in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update includes a mechanical synchronization of 11 files, resulting in a net change of +379/-1162 lines. Key updates include refreshed pricing JSON for cost APIs and OpenAPI schemas, along with updated Chinese service introductions for several datasets. This ensures that our documentation remains accurate and up-to-date.

items.title: Enhance Security Probes in Sol Radar 🚀
items.summary: This update integrates a multi-source security probe into the pipeline, enriching candidates with RugCheck and GoPlus risk flags. A new CLI command, `solradar security-check`, has been added to facilitate on-chain security checks. Documentation has also been updated to reflect these enhancements, ensuring users are informed of the new capabilities.

items.title: Enhance OpenAI Tasks API Documentation in A P Is 🚀
items.summary: A new integration guide for the OpenAI Tasks API has been added, detailing how to retrieve async image generation results using the `/openai/tasks` endpoint. Key features include the `retrieve` and `retrieve_batch` actions, along with a full response schema and an end-to-end example for implementation. This guide is essential for developers looking to utilize callback functionality effectively.

items.title: Enhance CLI with Async Task Retrieval in Clis 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new `tasks` command group to the CLI, allowing users to retrieve results of async image generation and editing tasks. Key features include the ability to fetch single tasks by ID or trace ID, as well as batch retrieval using various filters. The README has been updated with usage examples, and 11 new tests have been added to ensure robust functionality.

items.title: OpenAI MCP Server Verified Against Docs Spec in M C Ps 🚀
items.summary: The recent sync check for the OpenAI service confirmed that the MCP server is fully aligned with the latest OpenAPI specifications. Key components, including models, endpoints, and parameters, were thoroughly verified, and no code changes were necessary. This ensures that all functionalities remain intact and up-to-date.

items.title: Fix OpenAI Chat Completions Endpoint in S D K 🚀
items.summary: This update corrects the routing for the OpenAI chat completions endpoint in both TypeScript and Python SDKs. The endpoint has been changed from `/v1/chat/completions` to the proper AceDataCloud path `/openai/chat/completions`, ensuring compliance with the OpenAPI specification. All other OpenAI endpoints remain unaffected.

items.title: Enhance On-Chain Security with RugCheck & GoPlus in Sol Radar 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new security skill that integrates RugCheck and GoPlus to provide comprehensive on-chain security assessments for Solana tokens. It addresses the previous issue of null security values by offering detailed reports on mint authority, freeze authority, and other critical metrics. Additionally, a living document has been created to track ongoing improvements and ensure alignment with future updates.

items.title: Add Kong Service for OpenAI Tasks in Platform Deployment 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces an idempotent Python script that registers the Kong service and route for the `POST /openai/tasks` endpoint on the TSE gateway. The script has already been executed in production, ensuring that the path is now correctly routed, preventing 404 errors. This addition enhances the PlatformService's functionality by integrating the OpenAI tasks endpoint seamlessly.

items.title: Enhance OpenAI Tasks Integration Guide in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces comprehensive integration guides for the OpenAI Tasks API in both English and Simplified Chinese. The new markdown files provide detailed instructions on querying tasks submitted in callback mode, enhancing user experience and accessibility. The guides are now accessible in the platform sidebar, ensuring users can easily find the information they need.

items.title: Streamlined Image Uploads with Clipboard Paste in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new feature allowing users to paste images directly into upload fields across all image upload components in Nexior. By simply using `Ctrl+V` or `Cmd+V`, users can upload images without saving them to disk first, significantly enhancing workflow efficiency, especially for services that rely heavily on reference images. The implementation includes a new utility and mixin that seamlessly integrates with existing upload components.

items.title: Enhance SDK with OpenAI Image and Embedding Features in S D K 🚀
items.summary: This update integrates new OpenAI endpoints for image generation, editing, and embeddings into both TypeScript and Python SDKs. Key changes include the addition of the `Images` and `Embeddings` classes, which provide methods for generating images and creating embeddings. This enhancement improves user experience by enabling access to powerful OpenAI functionalities directly within the SDKs.

items.title: Updated MCP Servers Intro for Clarity in A P Is 🚀
items.summary: This update synchronizes the MCP Servers introduction in the README with the authoritative English source. The wording now includes 'and others' alongside the listed AI assistants, enhancing clarity. The MCP server table remains unchanged and fully in sync.

items.title: Documentation sync for overview service in M C Ps 📚
items.summary: This update reflects a no-op sync triggered by recent Chinese translation edits in the documentation for the overview service. The content remains unchanged, and there are no corresponding OpenAPI specifications to sync. Overall, the repository is now in sync with the latest documentation updates.

items.title: Documentation Sync for Overview Service in Clis 🚀
items.summary: This update confirms that recent changes to the `overview` service are solely documentation-related, with no updates to the CLI or OpenAPI specifications. The only modified file is `mcp/overview.mdx`, ensuring that no code changes are necessary. Additionally, a check on the `aichat` model confirms consistency across related files.

items.title: New Research Cycle Report Published in Sol Radar 🚀
items.summary: The latest research cycle report for April 26, 2026, has been published, adding a comprehensive analysis of 15 candidates. Key decisions include 9 holds, notably for ORCA and RAY, which showed significant 24-hour gains. No candidates met the buy threshold, highlighting the current market conditions.

items.title: Updated Pricing Links for Claude Code Documentation in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update corrects the pricing link in the Claude Code service documentation across all 12 localized versions. The previous link incorrectly directed users back to the Claude Code service page instead of the intended Claude API service. Now, users will be directed to the correct pricing details, enhancing their experience and clarity.

items.title: Fix silent deploy failures for Docker pushes in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update addresses a critical issue where the deploy workflow continued despite a failed Docker push, leading to outdated code being served. The fix removes the '|| true' from the push step, ensuring that any registry failure will halt the workflow. Additionally, it refines the directory processing to only include service directories with a docker-compose.yaml file, preventing unnecessary failures on unrelated changes.

items.title: Enhance API Docs with Library Variants in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a second-level pill selector for library variants in the API documentation code previews. Users can now select from multiple libraries for each programming language, such as `httpx`, `axios`, and `HTTPie`, enhancing the usability of the API examples. The implementation preserves existing formatting while adding new templates for various libraries.

items.title: Automated Solana Research Report Published in Sol Radar 🚀
items.summary: The latest automated Solana research cycle report has been published, detailing the review of 15 candidates. Notably, there were 2 hold intents for ORCA and RAY, while 6 candidates were explicitly skipped due to suspicious signals. The data sources have been confirmed healthy, ensuring reliable insights for future evaluations.

items.title: New Research Cycle Insights in Sol Radar 🚀
items.summary: The latest research cycle has reviewed 21 candidates, including 9 from the watchlist and 12 new listings. Notably, there are no buy intents this cycle, with three candidates holding and six skipped due to low scores or liquidity issues. Additionally, the data source health remains stable, except for a degraded status from Grok due to an invalid token.

items.title: Automated i18n Updates from zh-CN in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update includes auto-generated i18n translation changes derived from the zh-CN source. Several cache files have been removed to streamline the translation process. These changes enhance the efficiency of our internationalization efforts.

items.title: Update default Grok model for better performance in Sol Radar 🚀
items.summary: This update changes the default Grok model from `grok-4-1-fast-reasoning` to `grok-4` in the grok_credibility.sh script. This fix addresses the issue of Grok credibility probes returning as `unknown` and encountering platform 500 errors. The environment variable override for `SOLRADAR_GROK_MODEL` remains intact for future enhancements.

items.title: Enhance OpenAI Image Guides with GPT-Image-2 in A P Is 🚀
items.summary: This update integrates the latest documentation for the GPT-Image-2 model into the OpenAI images generation and edits guides. Key changes include new sections detailing the model's capabilities and usage patterns, along with updated intros to reflect multi-model support. These enhancements aim to improve user experience and provide clearer guidance on leveraging the new model's features.

items.title: Enhance OpenAI Image Generation with Partial Images in M C Ps 🎨
items.summary: This update syncs the OpenAI MCP server with the latest OpenAPI specification by adding a new optional parameter, `partial_images`, to the `openai_generate_image` function. This parameter allows users to specify the number of intermediate frames to emit during streaming, enhancing the image generation experience. The change impacts how images are generated and streamed, providing more flexibility for developers.

items.title: Enhance OpenAI Image Commands with New Parameters in Clis 🚀
items.summary: This update adds several missing parameters to the `image` and `edit` commands in the OpenAI CLI, aligning them with the latest OpenAPI specifications. Key additions include moderation levels, output compression options, and callback URLs for asynchronous processing. These enhancements improve functionality and user control over image generation and editing processes.

items.title: Fix default usage_field_map in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update restores the default value for the `usage_field_map` parameter in the `_write_json_response` method, resolving the HTTP 500 errors encountered during non-streaming chat completions. The change ensures that all subclasses correctly inherit the behavior, allowing for successful responses across all routes. Verification shows that requests now return valid completions instead of errors.

items.title: Enhance Homepage with New Sections and Resources in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces four new sections to the homepage, enhancing user engagement and providing essential information. The new sections include Platform Stats, Developer Resources, an FAQ, and a Final CTA, all designed to guide users effectively. Additionally, minor fixes were made to improve icon rendering and component imports.

items.title: Introducing AiChat Resource for Enhanced Conversations in SDK 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces the new `AiChat` resource to the SDK, enabling users to interact with the `POST /aichat/conversations` endpoint. It includes TypeScript and Python support, along with a comprehensive `AiChatModel` type covering 78 models. The client now exposes `client.aichat` for both synchronous and asynchronous operations, enhancing the overall functionality of the SDK.

items.title: Automated research cycle update in Sol Radar 🚀
items.summary: This PR introduces the latest automated research cycle report for April 26, 2026, featuring a detailed analysis of 20 candidates. Key highlights include the performance of ORCA with an 83.3% increase and the status of various data sources, with Grok experiencing degraded health. No new listings met the buy threshold, leading to a focus on holding strategies for certain candidates.

items.title: Enhance OpenAI Task Access in Gateway 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces the new `/openai/tasks` endpoint, allowing it to bypass authentication and billing, similar to existing endpoints like `/midjourney/tasks`. The endpoint retrieves task records submitted with a `callback_url`, ensuring that polling does not incur double charges. This change enhances user experience by streamlining access to OpenAI tasks.

items.title: Enhance OpenAI Tasks API for Image Polling in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces the `POST /openai/tasks` endpoint, allowing for efficient image callback polling. Key additions include OpenAPI specifications and cost-rule regression tests to ensure functionality. The implementation is designed to mirror existing task structures, enhancing integration with the OpenAI service.

items.title: Enhance Task Management with New Query Endpoint in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new `/tasks` query endpoint that allows clients to retrieve task statuses for image generation and editing requests. When a request includes a `callback_url`, the corresponding task is persisted in MongoDB, enabling efficient tracking through task IDs and user IDs. The changes enhance the overall functionality and usability of the Platform Service API.

items.title: Enhance Docs Auto-Sync Guardrails in Index 🚧
items.summary: This update introduces a critical guardrail in AGENTS.md to prevent accidental edits to the Mintlify Docs site. It clarifies the correct workflow for updating documentation, emphasizing that the Docs directory is auto-synced from the PlatformBackend. The changes aim to ensure that future agent sessions adhere to the proper documentation process, safeguarding against direct modifications to generated files.

items.title: Enhance Image Generation Guides with GPT-Image-2 in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new section for the GPT-Image-2 model in two Chinese developer documentation files. It includes real production examples and updates the API usage guidelines to reflect the capabilities of GPT-Image-2, enhancing image generation and editing processes. The changes aim to improve user experience by providing clearer instructions and showcasing the model's advanced features.

items.title: Streamlined API Key Usage in Sol Radar 🚀
items.summary: This update simplifies the handling of the AceDataCloud API key by removing the unnecessary SOLRADAR_ prefix. Key files such as .env.example and various SKILL.md documents have been updated to reflect this change, ensuring consistency across the project. The new approach enhances clarity and reduces potential confusion for developers using the API.

items.title: Enhance Diagnostics and Grok Integration in Sol Radar 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces the `solradar diagnose` command, allowing agents to self-report the visibility of environment variables without exposing sensitive values. Additionally, Grok now routes through AceDataCloud by default, improving the reliability of data retrieval. The changes also include lazy imports for better performance and a refined workflow checklist for enhanced operational efficiency.

items.title: Fix blog publishing issue by updating DOCS_DIR in Backend 🚀
items.summary: The publish-blog workflow was failing due to a directory restructuring, which left the root 'docs/' without any .md files. This update points the DOCS_DIR to 'docs/zh-CN', ensuring the workflow can access the necessary markdown files for the Chinese blog. The change includes a minor modification in the workflow configuration.

items.title: Automated Research Cycle Completed in Sol Radar 🚀
items.summary: The latest automated research cycle has been successfully completed, resulting in a comprehensive report detailing the review of 19 candidates. Key findings include 1 buy recommendation for SPIKE and 14 hold suggestions, while 4 candidates were skipped due to various concerns. The report is now available for review and will aid in future decision-making.

items.title: Enhance Quality Gate Tolerance in Sol Radar 🚀
items.summary: This update modifies the quality gate logic to allow for per-source degradation as long as at least one source reports a healthy status. Previously, any line containing 'unknown' would block the PR, which led to unnecessary rejections. The new rule improves the flexibility of the quality checks, ensuring that valid reports are not hindered by isolated issues.

items.title: Fix(worker): delay /record by 5s to avoid duplicate ApiUsage rows in Platform Service 🐛
Fix(workflow): drop bash-breaking '<context>' quotes in issue body in Sol Radar 🐛
Feat(narrative-signals): add Grok Twitter credibility probe in Sol Radar ✨
Refactor(openai/worker): unify handler hierarchy + USAGE_FIELD_MAP in Platform Service 🧹
Fix(documents): group credential selector by application + show token name in Frontend Web 🐛
Feat(redact): scrub base64 data URLs and cap oversize bodies in /record metadata in Gateway ✨
Feat(openai/worker): record success bodies + tighten model routing in Platform Service ✨
Fix(record): store raw worker request/response in ApiUsage metadata in Gateway 🐛
Enhance README with MCP Servers Info in A P Is 🚀
items.summary: This update enriches the README by adding a new section for MCP Servers, which includes descriptions and links for all 11 MCP servers. The translations from Chinese to English ensure that the documentation is accessible and in sync with the APIs monorepo. This enhancement improves user navigation and understanding of available services.

items.title: Documentation Update for Overview in S D K 📚
items.summary: This update reflects a documentation-only change following a sync triggered by a recent commit. The primary modification involved translating card descriptions from Chinese to English in the overview section, with no alterations to the OpenAPI specifications or SDK functionality. All existing providers and endpoints remain consistent with the current documentation.

items.title: Documentation Updates for MCP Overview in M C Ps 📚
items.summary: This update focuses on changes made to the documentation for the MCP overview, specifically the `mcp/overview.mdx` file. The modifications include translation updates for the zh-CN language, with no code changes or API specifications required. The repository remains in sync with no additional implementation needed.

items.title: No updates needed for overview service in Clis 🚀
items.summary: The recent changes to the overview service were purely documentation-related, with no modifications to API endpoints or CLI tools. The updates involved only translations in the `mcp/overview.mdx` file, ensuring that all CLI tools remain in sync with the documentation. As a result, no code changes are necessary.

items.title: Research Cycle Update: Data Providers Unreachable in Sol Radar 🚫
items.summary: The scheduled research cycle for April 26, 2026, has been completed, but all external data providers were degraded, resulting in no new-listing candidates. Nine watchlist mints were reviewed, all scoring 30/100, with no buy or hold signals possible due to lack of market data. This report has been published in accordance with the graceful-degradation policy to maintain ledger continuity.

items.title: Automated research cycle completed in Sol Radar 🚀
items.summary: The automated research cycle for April 26, 2026, has been successfully completed. All external enrichment providers experienced degradation, leading to the review of 9 watchlist candidates, all of which were skipped due to lack of liquidity and market data. The detailed report documents these findings and maintains ledger continuity.

items.title: Fix heredoc bug in workflow for report quality gate in Sol Radar 🚀
items.summary: This update resolves a heredoc bug in the scheduled-research workflow that caused failures in report validation. The validation logic has been extracted to a new Python script, ensuring that reports are checked for required content before auto-merging. Key changes include modifications to the workflow file and the addition of the report quality gate script.

items.title: Remove Seedream E2E Probe in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update removes the Seedream end-to-end probe as per product request. The files `test-seedream.yaml` and `test_seedream.py` have been deleted, ensuring that no future deployments will recreate the Deployment. The existing live Deployment will be manually deleted after the merge.

items.title: Strengthen Agent Task Prompts and Introduce Quality Gates in Sol Radar 🚀
items.summary: This update enhances the agent task prompt by incorporating a detailed checklist and acceptance criteria. Additionally, it implements quality gates to prevent low-quality skeleton reports from being merged, ensuring higher standards in report content.

items.title: Research Cycle Update: Data Providers Unreachable in Sol Radar 🚨
items.summary: The scheduled research cycle for April 26, 2026, faced significant challenges as all external data providers were unreachable due to DNS blocking. As a result, the analysis returned no actionable signals, with all 9 watchlist mints scoring at a floor value of 30/100. Detailed documentation of the failures is available in the source errors section of the report.
